---
title: "Blog"
subtitle: Posts about research and programming
description: >
  Posts by Johan Larsson on statistics, optimization, and scientific computing
  in R, Python, Julia, and Rust, plus notes on the software he develops.
comments: false
listing:
  contents: .
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  sort-ui: true
  filter-ui: true
  feed: true
  categories: true
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
---
